appraisal_events.evidence: « il conclut que je parlais tout seul … il déclara qu’il voyait enfin la raison … Il se trompa. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Bloch’s confident inferences about the narrator are reported and then directly corrected; the narrator highlights his error as an instance of drawing false consequences from a true detail.

status_effects.explanation: His interpretive authority is locally lowered because his explanations are shown to be wrong.
